build.beforeDevCommand: bun run copy-sidecar && bun run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: bun run copy-sidecar && bun run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; worker-src 'self' blob:; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost https: data:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; frame-src https:
